---
title: "Check Nodes Pipeline (T, R, Python, Bash)"
format: html
---

# Introduction

This report showcases a polyglot pipeline managed by **T**.
The pipeline involves nodes written in T, R, Python, and Bash.

# Native T Data
```{t}
#| label: data-t
print(read_node("data_t"))
```

# DataFrames (Arrow)
```{t}
#| label: df-r
print(read_node("df_r"))
```

```{t}
#| label: df-py
print(read_node("df_py"))
```

# R ggplot (plot_r)
```{t}
#| label: plot-r
print(read_node("plot_r"))
```

# R Models
```{t}
#| label: lm-r
print(read_node("lm_r"))
```

```{t}
#| label: glm-r
print(read_node("glm_r"))
```

# Python Models
```{t}
#| label: lm-py
print(read_node("lm_py"))
```

```{t}
#| label: logit-py
print(read_node("logit_py"))
```

# PMML Models
```{t}
#| label: r-model-pmml
print(read_node("r_model_pmml"))
```

```{t}
#| label: py-model-pmml
print(read_node("py_model_pmml"))
```

# T-Native Predictions
```{t}
#| label: pred-t-r
print(read_node("pred_t_r"))
```

```{t}
#| label: pred-t-py
print(read_node("pred_t_py"))
```

# Summaries and Vectors
```{t}
#| label: model-r-json
print(read_node("model_r_json"))
```

```{t}
#| label: vector-py
print(read_node("vector_py"))
```

# Bash Results
```{t}
#| label: res-bash
print(read_node("res_bash"))
```
